channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: China's Xi signals trade progress as ‘biggest summit’ with Trump begins
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump-Xi summit live: US president says relationship with China will be ‘better than ever’ as key meeting begins
- Trump insists US-China relations are in a good place despite differences as he wraps up Beijing trip
- Xi-Trump summit live: Trump says ‘we do great with China’ ahead of second meeting
- Ahead of Day 2 talks with Xi, Trump says he hopes US-China ties will be 'stronger and better'
- Trump and Xi's initial meeting reveals dueling priorities
- Chinese President Xi welcomes visiting US President Trump in Beijing
- Xi-Trump summit day 1: everything you need to know from the meeting in Beijing
- Trump-Xi meeting: Expert decodes secret powerplay in first handshake of China visit
- Trump-Xi summit: Optimism amid deep strategic divides
- Trump in Beijing: Future of US-China relations swings between co-operation and confrontation
- Trump Offers Platitudes While Xi Warns Of Possible Confrontation During China Summit
- Trump says talks with Xi 'extremely positive and productive'
- Trump calls Xi a friend, Xi says China and US should be partners, not rivals
- Trump Hails Xi Talks At Grand Beijing Banquet Attended By Leaders, CEOs

- Trump tells China’s Xi ‘it’s an honor to be your friend’
